overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a foggy morning walk through the historic city of Saint Denis. The player walks along covered sidewalks past tram tracks and horse-drawn carriages, transitioning from a commercial street with storefronts to an open plaza with a columned building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with tram tracks

events.description: tram passes by on the left side along the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to the Chevalier building

notable_agents.action: tram moving along tracks from left to right

entered.detail: building with 'Chevalier' signage on the wooden door
wooden awning covering the sidewalk supported by columns
wet cobblestone road with embedded tram tracks
construction barriers and crates in the street
dark colored vintage tram approaching on tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a foggy covered sidewalk next to the Chevalier building. The player walks forward as a tram passes by on the left, moving along the cobblestone street lined with wooden barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with The Majestic

events.description: entering narrower alley section with The Majestic building

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the tram into a narrower section

notable_agents.action: person in blue uniform standing near building entrance with arms crossed

entered.detail: building with golden lion sign and 'The Majestic' lettering
narrow passage between buildings leading deeper into the block

segments.scene_description: Walking past the tram, the scene transitions into a narrower alley section featuring The Majestic building with its distinctive golden lion signage. The covered awning continues overhead as wooden crates appear on the left near the alley entrance.

events.description: passing by parked horse-drawn carriage on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts and benches along the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked along the street

entered.detail: storefront with 'Tailors and Shirtmakers' painted on the window
tall ornate pole with circular clock face
storefront with 'Tobacco' lettering on the window

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past various storefronts including a tailors shop and tobacco shop. Wooden benches line the left side of the sidewalk, and a street clock stands in the center of the view as horse-drawn carriages are visible parked along the street.

events.description: turning corner and exiting covered walkway into open street
crossing the cobblestone street among pedestrians and horse carriages

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and crossing the street, passing pedestrians in period clothing

notable_agents.action: two men in suits and top hats walking across the cobblestone street

entered.detail: ornate multi-story building with red trim and balconies
statue on tall stone pedestal in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the player turns the corner at the ornate building with red trim and crosses the cobblestone street. Pedestrians in period clothing walk by, and a statue on a pedestal becomes visible in the open plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with columned building and newsstand

events.description: entering open plaza area with statue and columned building

agents.ego_description: walking across the open cobblestone plaza toward the columned building

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked near the plaza trees

entered.detail: grand building with large stone columns at the entrance
wooden newsstand with vintage posters and newspapers
mature trees lining the cobblestone plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide cobblestone plaza with mature trees and a statue. The player approaches a grand building with stone columns and a wooden newsstand covered in vintage posters, ending the walk at the kiosk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit public plaza. It begins on a covered sidewalk beside the Chevalier building, moving forward as a tram passes along a cobblestone street lined with wooden barriers. As the camera progresses, the scene shifts into a narrower alleyway featuring the golden lion signage of The Majestic building and wooden crates, before continuing past a series of storefronts, benches, and a street clock where horse-drawn carriages are parked. The walkway then ends as the camera turns a corner at an ornate red-trimmed building and crosses the street past period pedestrians toward a distant statue. Finally, the view expands into a broad cobblestone plaza with mature trees, concluding as the camera approaches a grand columned building and a vintage poster-covered newsstand.
